title: Plastic Measuring Jug, Measuring Cup Jugs for Baking Cooking, 150ML, 300ML, 600ML, Easy to Read Measurements, Cook with Accuracy
features: 【Food Grade Measuring Jugs】Our Measuring Cups Set are made of High quality food grade polypropylene. BPA-free, latex-free, Meets Safety Standards, it does not react with any type of food or beverages.

【Easy to Read Measurements】Bright black, embossed markings on clear beakers allows you to view, add, measure and adjust liquids. These 3 different size measuring cups can be stacked for easy and space saving storage.
【100% high quality】The handle is ergonomically designed, allowing for an easy, comfortable grip. Unique spout design for easy pouring. The quality is sturdy which the thickness is about 3mm.

【Customer first】Our products are quality guaranteed and 100% brand new. If you have any question or suggestion about our product, please contact us, we promise we will give you a satisfy reply. thank you.
description: Product Description It's a handy kitchen essential for all your baking and cooking needs! Whether you consider yourself a culinary connoisseur or a beginner chef, everyone knows that just the right amount of ingredients can make a difference from creating tasteless meals to a delectable and memorable cuisine your friends and family will enjoy. Triangular mouth design: Reinforced handle design, comfortable grip, not easy to break or slip. Easy to handle with one hand, good for left or right hand. Clear and precise scales: Measuring cups set marked in English and metric units(Ounce, Cup, Milliliters), you can get the correct amount of each ingredient very easily. Triangular mouth design: It can effectively ensure that the liquid does not leak during the pouring process, and it is more comfortable to use. Description: 1. This cup makes easy measuring and pouring for all your kitchen needs. 2. Non-slip handle for excellent control while pouring of water, cooking oil, etc. 3. With easy-to-read black markings that contrast nicely for easier and accurate measuring. 4. Designed with non-drip, slanted, lipped spouts for accuracy and convenience for no-spill ease. 5. The measuring cup for professional or everyday use can make you the chef you want to be. Warm tip: 1. Please hand wash the liquid measuring cup to protect the scale. 2. Please don't rub the surface too hard in case of deleting the scale. 3. Please don't put the measuring jug on fire directly. 4. Please don't use the measuring jug to hold boiling water.
